understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' by navigating through the grid while avoiding spike tiles.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is strictly horizontal (MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT); after each horizontal move the character falls automatically in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid tile or hazard. CLICK removes breakable 'x' blocks, UNDO reverts the last action. Spikes ('u'/'v') instantly end the attempt on landing. Each level has 2 attempts and a 50-turn budget per attempt.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' by navigating through the grid while avoiding spike tiles.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is strictly horizontal (MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT); after each horizontal move the character falls automatically in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid tile or hazard. CLICK removes breakable 'x' blocks, UNDO reverts the last action. Spikes ('u'/'v') instantly end the attempt on landing. Each level has 2 attempts and a 50-turn budget per attempt.
